channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Don't look at the resume: Elon Musk admits he's fallen prey to flashy credentials and says conversation matters most when hiring
item.description: The Tesla and SpaceX CEO said he prioritizes hiring candidates with a wow factor.

item.title: Big Short legend Steve Eisman says everyone is buying the wrong AI stocks
item.description: Eisman, known for predicting the housing bubble, believes investors are miscalculating the AI trade.

item.title: The 33-year-old executive Satya Nadella is trusting to fix Microsoft's Copilot AI assistant
item.description: Jacob Andreou has risen quickly at the 51-year-old tech giant and now leads efforts to revamp its key AI product.

item.title: Stop blaming Gen Z for resisting RTO: 71% say they want a hybrid balance—and now they’re quietly leading the office comeback
item.description: Gen Z workers actually want to be in the office—just not five days a week. They're showing up voluntarily more than any generation.
